# Lisa T. Miller — AI Strategy for Healthcare Operations
> Author, speaker, and former hospital operations executive with 30+ years of experience helping health systems reduce administrative waste through AI automation. Holds 2 U.S. patents in healthcare analytics.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://lisatmiller.ai/): AI strategy for hospital and health system operations
- [About Lisa T. Miller](https://lisatmiller.ai/about-lisa-t-miller/): Biography, credentials, patents, and professional background
- [Services](https://lisatmiller.ai/services/): AI strategy, revenue cycle automation, operational assessments
- [AI for Healthcare](https://lisatmiller.ai/ai-healthcare/): AI applications across 10 healthcare domains
- [AI for the Business of Healthcare](https://lisatmiller.ai/ai-business-of-healthcare/): AI for revenue cycle, compliance, and administrative operations
- [Statistics & Benchmarks](https://lisatmiller.ai/statistics/): Verified healthcare AI statistics and benchmarks
- [Resources](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/): Articles and guides on AI in healthcare
- [Contact](https://lisatmiller.ai/contact/): Schedule a strategy call

## Articles
- [AI Is Not a Software Purchase](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/ai-is-not-a-software-purchase/)
- [The Work Nobody Went Into Healthcare to Do](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/work-nobody-went-into-healthcare-to-do/)
- [Your Best People Carry Your Most Broken Processes](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/your-best-people-carry-broken-processes/)
- [What AI Can Actually Do for the Revenue Cycle](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/what-ai-can-do-for-revenue-cycle/)
- [Deciding Where AI Fits, a CFO's Guide](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/deciding-where-ai-fits-cfo-guide/)
- [Everyone Is Selling Intelligence. Nobody Has Read Your Operations.](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/everyone-is-selling-intelligence/)
